description: Renovate is the single owner of dependency updates for this repo; keep repository-level (UI) Dependabot disabled.
Covers: Go modules (cli/), Helm chart dependencies (helm-charts/*/Chart.yaml), GitHub Actions pins, and chart revision pins in tenants/*/tenant.yaml via the custom regex managers below.
Tenant service entries with chart: "" (git-sourced or vendored via chartPath) are intentionally not matched — only registry-backed chart pins are updated.

customManagers.description: Chart pins in tenant manifests served from HTTPS Helm repositories (chart/repo/revision triples)
Chart pins in tenant manifests served from OCI registries (ghcr.io)
